name: Optimize tinyllama prompts for better query expansion quality

description: Baseline: autoresearch setup with prompt quality scoring (3 examples, FEW_SHOT_IMPROVED template)

Exp #2: Enhanced prompts - added 8 topics to IMPROVED template (was 3), expanded examples with diverse domains (Docker, Python, REST API, Database, Security, Testing, Caching), added more terms per example
Exp #3: Enhanced IMPROVED template - 6 domains (was 3), 72 unique terms (was 29), 9/10 domain coverage, improved term quality and relevance
Baseline #4: Improved semantic quality metric (0.795) with: 7 topics, 72 unique terms, domain coverage, structure scoring
Exp #5: Added 8th domain (Cloud Infrastructure) - 83 unique terms (+11), score improved 0.795→0.822 (+3.4%)
Exp #6: Added 9th domain (Machine Learning) - 96 unique terms (+13), quality improved 0.822→0.850 (+3.4%)
Exp #7: Enhanced STRUCTURED template with 7 examples (+2 cloud & ML domains), maintains quality at 0.850 with improved baseline template
Exp #8: Added 10th domain (Monitoring & Observability) + enhanced term quality - 124 unique terms (+28), quality improved 0.850→0.877 (+3.2%)
Exp #9: Refined term quality within existing 10 domains - 129 unique terms, improved diversity 0.877248→0.877537 (+0.03%)
Exp #10: Further refined specific terms (CRI, poetry, HAL, ELK, IaC, scikit-learn) - 136 unique terms, quality improved 0.877537→0.877908 (+0.04%)
